title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) for and in Behalf of the Local Government Unit of Los Baños with Pilotage Trading and Construction, Incorporated on Ensuring Safe and Secure Disposal of Residual Solid Wastes and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 07/20/2020)
